overview: An AI-powered voice cloning system that lets users record or upload voice samples, clone their voice using ElevenLabs AI, and synthesize natural-sounding speech from any text input using their cloned voice.
features: Browser-based voice recording with microphone capture and playback preview
Upload pre-recorded voice files (MP3, WAV, WebM) for cloning
AI voice cloning via ElevenLabs Instant Voice Clone API
Text-to-speech synthesis using cloned voices with adjustable stability and style
Voice library dashboard to manage, play, and delete cloned voices
Download generated TTS audio as MP3
User accounts and protected voice library with Internet Identity login
